title: Design System: IDX Stock Analysis & Screening

glass.note: Liquid Glass — frosted, lightly refractive material for floating chrome ONLY (modals, popovers, both calendars, primary/secondary action buttons). Never on report/content surfaces. Theme-aware tokens live in :root / .dark.

--glass-fill.purpose: Tint base for the translucent fill (= glass-tint-dark at night).

--glass-fill-a.purpose: Fill opacity — translucent in both themes so the panel reads as see-through over the dimmed page. The dark modal backdrop scrim carries readability; dark ink over the white day fill clears AA with room to spare even on a dimmed page.

--glass-rim-a.purpose: Rim opacity — the specular top edge.

--glass-blur.purpose: Backdrop blur radius, paired with saturate(185%).

#glass-distortion.value: feTurbulence + feDisplacementMap, scale 28, no specular-lighting pass
#glass-distortion.purpose: One shared SVG filter mounted once at app root — real refraction, tuned low for legibility and zero scroll jank.

display.purpose: Masthead, big report/stage headings, large rating figures. Fixed rem scale, never fluid.

title.purpose: Section headings inside a report. Sentence case only.

body.purpose: UI copy, labels, descriptions, buttons. Prose caps near 65ch.

label.purpose: Kickers, prices, dates, scores, tickers — always tabular-nums.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: Inputs and inline panels. Barely-there grounding.

shadows.name: floating-menu
shadows.purpose: Autocomplete dropdowns, settings popover, filters panel.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Upload / confirm dialogs over a dimmed backdrop.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default entrance/transition easing — list items, dropdowns, stages.

motion.name: theme-200
motion.purpose: Body background/color crossfade when toggling light/dark.

components.name: Primary Button (Liquid Glass)
components.description: The one green action, in the .glass-accent material — a fully-rounded pill. Brand fill at ≥84% (hover 92%) with backdrop blur, a lit top rim, a deep brand under-glow, and a soft AMBIENT HALO (two wide low-opacity brand glows) that bleeds past the pill edge — the signature of the new liquid-glass read. Dark on-brand text, never white. Stays the most decisive green on screen. Disabled/in-flight drops the halo (no green radiation when non-actionable).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { position:relative; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; min-height:44px; padding:10px 24px; border:1px solid color-mix(in srgb, #fff 45%, transparent); border-radius:9999px; background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 84%, transparent); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(10px) saturate(190%); backdrop-filter:blur(10px) saturate(190%); box-shadow:0 10px 30px -8px color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 55%, transparent), 0 4px 14px -6px color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 40%, transparent), inset 1.5px 1.5px 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.6), inset 0 -3px 8px -2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand-deep) 60%, transparent); color:var(--c-on-brand); font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 92%, transparent); box-shadow:0 16px 44px -8px color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 72%, transparent), 0 6px 18px -6px color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 50%, transparent), inset 1.5px 1.5px 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.72), inset 0 -3px 8px -2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand-deep) 70%, transparent); transform:translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(0) scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--c-ink); outline-offset:3px; border-radius:9999px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled, .ds-btn-primary[aria-busy="true"] { background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 60%, transparent); box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgb(255 255 255 / 0.3), inset 0 -2px 6px -2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand-deep) 40%, transparent); opacity:0.45; cursor:not-allowed; } .dark .ds-btn-primary { box-shadow:0 12px 34px -8px color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 62%, transparent), 0 4px 16px -6px color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 48%, transparent), inset 1.5px 1.5px 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.5), inset 0 -3px 8px -2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand-deep) 60%, transparent); } .dark .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline-color:#eef1f4; }

components.name: Quiet Button (Liquid Glass)
components.description: The secondary affordance, in the .glass-quiet material — a fully-rounded pill matching the primary's shape + ambient-halo vocabulary. Translucent elevated fill (58%, hover 76%) + blur + white rim, with a NEUTRAL halo (ink-tinted light / soft black night, never green) bleeding past the edge so the pair reads as one material but the quiet stays a secondary, not a second CTA. Muted ink that firms to ink on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-quiet { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; min-height:44px; padding:10px 24px; border:1px solid rgb(var(--glass-rim) / var(--glass-rim-a)); border-radius:9999px; background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-elevated) 58%, transparent); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px) saturate(170%); backdrop-filter:blur(12px) saturate(170%); box-shadow:0 8px 22px -8px rgb(22 24 28 / 0.28), 0 3px 10px -6px rgb(22 24 28 / 0.18), var(--shadow-raised), inset 0 1px 0 rgb(255 255 255 / 0.32), inset 1px 1px 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.2); color:var(--c-ink-muted); font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-quiet:hover { background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-elevated) 76%, transparent); border-color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-ink-muted) 38%, transparent); box-shadow:0 12px 30px -8px rgb(22 24 28 / 0.36), 0 4px 12px -6px rgb(22 24 28 / 0.22), var(--shadow-float), inset 0 1px 0 rgb(255 255 255 / 0.38), inset 1px 1px 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.24); color:var(--c-ink); transform:translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-quiet:active { transform:translateY(0) scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-quiet:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--c-ink); outline-offset:3px; border-radius:9999px; } .dark .ds-btn-quiet { box-shadow:0 10px 28px -8px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.62), 0 3px 12px -6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.5), var(--shadow-raised), inset 0 1px 0 rgb(255 255 255 / 0.1), inset 1px 1px 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.07); } .dark .ds-btn-quiet:focus-visible { outline-color:#eef1f4; }

components.name: Liquid Glass Surface
components.description: Signature floating-chrome material — every modal, the settings popover, search/filter popovers, both calendars. Frosted, lightly refractive sheet over a bg-black/55 backdrop scrim; content rides above at z-index 2 so text stays crisp. Ships an opaque fallback for no-backdrop-filter and prefers-reduced-transparency.
components.html:
Pick a date

The screen reads the tape as of your chosen close.
components.css: .ds-glass { position:relative; max-width:24rem; padding:28px; border:1px solid rgb(var(--glass-rim) / var(--glass-rim-a)); border-radius:16px; background:rgb(var(--glass-fill) / var(--glass-fill-a)); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(var(--glass-blur)) saturate(185%); backdrop-filter:blur(var(--glass-blur)) saturate(185%); box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgb(var(--glass-rim) / var(--glass-rim-a)), 0 6px 14px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.10), 0 22px 44px -12px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.18); } .ds-glass-title { margin:0; font-family:Newsreader,Georgia,serif; font-size:1.5rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:-0.02em; color:var(--c-ink); } .ds-glass-body { margin:6px 0 0; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--c-ink-muted); } @supports not ((-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(1px)) or (backdrop-filter:blur(1px))) { .ds-glass { background:var(--c-elevated); } }

components.name: Liquid Glass Option Card
components.description: Interactive choice tile (the decision modal's two options). Translucent resting fill (40%, hover 56%) so the modal's refracted content shows through; lifts and gains a green rim on hover.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:4px; width:100%; padding:16px; text-align:left; border:1px solid rgb(var(--glass-rim) / var(--glass-rim-a)); border-radius:12px; background:color-mix(in srgb, rgb(var(--glass-fill)) 40%, transparent); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px) saturate(170%); backdrop-filter:blur(12px) saturate(170%); cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-glass-card:hover { background:color-mix(in srgb, rgb(var(--glass-fill)) 56%, transparent); border-color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 55%, transparent); transform:translateY(-2px); } .ds-glass-card:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--c-brand); outline-offset:2px; } .ds-glass-card-title { font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--c-ink); } .ds-glass-card-sub { font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--c-ink-muted); }

components.name: Liquid Glass Inline Tray
components.description: Brand-tinted recessed tray (.glass-well) backing an inline .glass-surface that has no dark scrim behind it (the analysis-step calendar). Glass refracts what's behind it, so over the blank page the frost has nothing to bend; the tinted tray + tint ring give the surface something to float over so it reads as glass, not a flat white card. Theme-aware.
components.css: .ds-glass-well { padding:14px; border:1px solid var(--c-line); border-radius:20px; background-image:radial-gradient(125% 90% at 50% 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 13%, transparent) 0%, transparent 62%), linear-gradient(158deg, var(--c-brand-tint) 0%, var(--c-well) 100%); box-shadow:inset 0 1px 3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.07); } .ds-glass-tray-surface { padding:24px; border:1px solid rgb(var(--glass-rim) / var(--glass-rim-a)); border-radius:16px; background:rgb(var(--glass-fill) / var(--glass-fill-a)); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(var(--glass-blur)) saturate(185%); backdrop-filter:blur(var(--glass-blur)) saturate(185%); box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgb(var(--glass-rim) / var(--glass-rim-a)), 0 6px 14px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.10), 0 22px 44px -12px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.18); font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--c-ink); }

components.name: Verdict Pill
components.description: Tinted background + same-hue text. Tone is chosen by meaning (here: accumulation = up green).
components.css: .ds-pill { display:inline-block; padding:2px 10px; border-radius:9999px; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:500; } .ds-pill-pos { background:var(--c-pos-tint); color:var(--c-pos); } .ds-pill-neg { background:var(--c-neg-tint); color:var(--c-neg); } .ds-pill-warn { background:var(--c-warn-tint); color:var(--c-warn); } .ds-pill-info { background:var(--c-info-tint); color:var(--c-info); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Mono ticker field. Border shifts to green with a soft ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width:100%; padding:10px 14px; border:1px solid var(--c-line); border-radius:8px; background:var(--c-paper); color:var(--c-ink); font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.875rem; transition:border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; color:var(--c-ink-muted); } .ds-input:hover { border-color:var(--c-ink-muted); } .ds-input:focus { outline:none; border-color:var(--c-brand); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 20%, transparent); }

components.name: Nav Tab
components.description: Top tab. Active = ink over a 2px green underline; inactive = muted with a faint brand hover.
components.html: Stock ScreeningAI Status
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex; gap:24px; } .ds-tab { padding-bottom:12px; border-bottom:2px solid transparent; color:var(--c-ink-muted); font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; text-decoration:none; cursor:pointer; transition:color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-tab:hover { color:var(--c-ink); border-color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-brand) 20%, transparent); } .ds-tab-active { color:var(--c-ink); border-color:var(--c-brand); }

components.name: Theme Toggle
components.description: Segmented light/dark control from the settings popover. Active segment = green fill + on-brand text.
components.css: .ds-toggle { display:inline-flex; gap:4px; padding:4px; border:1px solid var(--c-line); border-radius:9999px; background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-well) 60%, transparent); } .ds-seg { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px; min-height:36px; padding:0 12px; border:none; border-radius:9999px; background:transparent; color:var(--c-ink-muted); font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-seg:hover { color:var(--c-ink); } .ds-seg-active { background:var(--c-brand); color:var(--c-on-brand); }

components.name: Dotted-Leader Row
components.description: The typographic spine: muted label · dotted leader · tabular value, optionally verdict-toned.
components.html: Stop lossRp 2,840
components.css: .ds-row { display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:8px; padding:6px 0; } .ds-row-label { flex-shrink:0; color:var(--c-ink-muted); font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; } .ds-row-leader { flex:1; min-width:16px; transform:translateY(-4px); border-bottom:1px dotted var(--c-line); } .ds-row-value { text-align:right; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; color:var(--c-ink); } .ds-row-neg { color:var(--c-neg); } .ds-row-pos { color:var(--c-pos); }

narrative.overview: A quiet research desk that happens to read the live order flow. It carries itself like a well-typeset equity-research note — serif masthead, dotted-leader rows, sentence-case headings, generous air around the numbers — but it is wired to the Indonesia Stock Exchange tape, so a single decisive green can light up when the flow says something. Typography and restraint do the reading-room work; one Stockbit green does the terminal work. The surface comes in two ambient settings: Day is a pure-white reading room, Night is a near-black trading floor, both carried by one token set the user flips from the gear in the top-right. Color is always a verdict, never decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Literate, authored feel — the page reads like research, not a feed.
One decisive green; all other color is semantic verdict only.
Numbers are the content: tabular figures, aligned columns, dotted-leader rows.
Dual theme (light reading room / dark trading floor) from one token set.
Screenshot-ready — any section cropped and shared stands alone legibly.
Liquid Glass on floating chrome only (modals, popovers, calendars, action buttons); content stays opaque.

rules.name: The On-Brand Rule
rules.body: A green fill never carries white text. White-on-#13b87a fails contrast (2.6:1); white-on-#1ece85 fails worse (2.0:1). Green fills carry on-brand (#08130d) dark text. When green must be text, use brand-strong, never brand.

rules.name: The Verdict Rule
rules.body: Green, red, and amber appear only where they carry direction, rating, or risk. A gain or loss always also carries a +/− sign or word — color is never the sole signal.

rules.name: The Atmospheric Ground Rule
rules.body: Paper surfaces stay near-neutral (white at the top of a raised panel's gradient), but the page canvas carries a faint brand-hued atmospheric lift (--canvas, ~5% green at top, fading out) so the ground reads as lit rather than dead-flat. The tint is the brand's own green, never warm/cream — warmth is still forbidden.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Headings are sentence case — never ALL CAPS. Short mono section labels are the one rationed exception.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: Any number in a column is mono with tabular-nums; scores and grades align to fixed-width columns so the eye scans straight down.

rules.name: The Glass-On-Chrome-Only Rule
rules.body: Liquid Glass is for layers that float above the page — modals, popovers, calendars, action buttons. It is forbidden on the reading layer: reports, dotted-leader rows, the verdict card, data tables. If content is behind glass, it's wrong.

rules.name: The Decisive-Glass Rule
rules.body: A glass primary action (.glass-accent) carries the brand fill at ≥80% opacity. Translucency is the texture, not an excuse to wash the green out — the primary CTA must always be the most decisive green on screen, never paler than a selected date or active toggle.

rules.name: The Glass-Fallback Rule
rules.body: Every glass surface ships an opaque fallback for no-backdrop-filter and reduced-transparency. Never let the only path to a surface's fill be a blur the browser might not paint.

rules.name: The No-Card-Stack Rule
rules.body: Surfaces gain depth, but a report still reads like a document: report facts are dotted-leader rows, not tiled stat cards, and cards are never nested inside cards.

rules.name: The Surface-Over-Shadow Rule
rules.body: In dark mode, elevation is carried by the lighter surface gradient plus the top edge highlight and a brighter hairline — never a darker shadow. A deep ambient shadow sits under floating layers only.

dos: Do carry on-brand (#08130d) text on every green fill; reach for brand-strong when green must be text. Never white on green.
Do keep color a verdict — green/red/amber only where direction, rating, or risk is meant, always paired with a +/− sign or word.
Do set every figure in IBM Plex Mono with tabular-nums and align scores/grades to fixed-width columns.
Do separate report sections with hairlines and dotted leaders; keep the single centered max-w-4xl column.
Do give real containers depth via .surface-raised / .surface-float (gradient sheen + soft tinted shadow + edge highlight), not flat fills.
Do carry night-mode elevation with the lighter surface gradient + top edge highlight + brighter hairline; reserve deep ambient shadow for floating layers.
Do keep paper surfaces near-neutral and let the --canvas carry only a faint brand-green atmospheric lift — identity stays in the green, type, and data.

Do reserve the liquid-glass material (.glass-*, §4) for floating chrome only — modals, popovers, both calendars, and the primary/secondary action buttons — with content lifted above the glass and an opaque fallback for unsupported browsers.
donts: Don't reproduce Bloomberg-terminal clutter — no wall-to-wall density, no ALL-CAPS shouting, no ten colors fighting for attention.
Don't drift into crypto-hype aesthetics — no neon glows, no gamified urgency, no gradient text.
Don't ship a generic indigo SaaS dashboard — the one accent is Stockbit green, never default Tailwind blue/indigo.
Don't nest cards inside cards or tile the report into identical stat boxes — depth is for genuine containers, not for boxing every fact.
Don't tint the ground warm/cream or use a fluid clamp() display scale (the only canvas tint allowed is the brand green).

Don't put glass on the reading layer — no glassmorphism on reports, dotted-leader rows, the verdict card, or data tables. The liquid-glass material is only for floating chrome; content stays opaque and screenshot-legible.
Don't wash the green out — a glass primary (.glass-accent) holds brand fill at ≥80%; translucency is the texture, never an excuse to dim the CTA below a selected date or active toggle.
Don't let depth get loud — no neon glow or heavy drop shadows; keep it the soft, refined layered system, and ship an opaque fallback for every glass surface.
Don't rely on color alone, hover alone, or shadow alone to carry meaning.
